info.title: CSTOJS CLI
info.description: Dotnet tool/CLI for C# to JS transpiler.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Dotnet tool/cli for a CSharpToJavaScript library.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a barebone 'cstojs_options.xml', without running the dotnet commands.

arguments.name: folder
arguments.description: Output folder. Can be absolute path or relative.

arguments.name: folder
arguments.description: Output folder. Can be absolute path or relative.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watches specified files in the 'cstojs_options.xml' with an interval and translates them. Note: The 'cstojs_options.xml' file is not being monitored, so any changes require the command to be restarted.

options.name: --delay
options.description: Delay watching the files again by milliseconds. (1000-10000) [default: 3000]
